sql: SELECT srcip, SUM(pkt_len) AS bytes FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcip ORDER BY bytes DESC

query_description: Distinct source ports per source IP
sql: SELECT srcip, COUNT(DISTINCT srcport) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcip ORDER BY n DESC

query_description: Distinct destination IPs contacted per source IP
sql: SELECT srcip, COUNT(DISTINCT dstip) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcip ORDER BY n DESC

query_description: Distinct destination ports contacted per source IP
sql: SELECT srcip, COUNT(DISTINCT dstport) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcip ORDER BY n DESC

query_description: Distinct destination IP and destination port pairs contacted per source IP
sql: SELECT srcip, COUNT(DISTINCT (dstip, dstport)) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcip ORDER BY n DESC
SELECT srcip, COUNT(DISTINCT (srcip, dstip, srcport, dstport, proto)) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcip ORDER BY n DESC
SELECT dstip, SUM(pkt_len) AS bytes FROM {table_name} GROUP BY dstip ORDER BY bytes DESC

query_description: Distinct destination ports per destination IP
sql: SELECT dstip, COUNT(DISTINCT dstport) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY dstip ORDER BY n DESC

query_description: Distinct source IPs contacting each destination IP
sql: SELECT dstip, COUNT(DISTINCT srcip) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY dstip ORDER BY n DESC

query_description: Distinct source ports per destination IP
sql: SELECT dstip, COUNT(DISTINCT srcport) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY dstip ORDER BY n DESC

query_description: Distinct source IP and source port pairs per destination IP
sql: SELECT dstip, COUNT(DISTINCT (srcip, srcport)) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY dstip ORDER BY n DESC
SELECT dstip, COUNT(DISTINCT (srcip, dstip, srcport, dstport, proto)) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY dstip ORDER BY n DESC

query_description: Number of packets per source-destination IP pair
sql: SELECT srcip, dstip, COUNT(*) AS pkts FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcip, dstip ORDER BY pkts DESC

query_description: Total bytes per source-destination IP pair
sql: SELECT srcip, dstip, SUM(pkt_len) AS bytes FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcip, dstip ORDER BY bytes DESC

query_description: Distinct source ports per source-destination IP pair
sql: SELECT srcip, dstip, COUNT(DISTINCT srcport) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcip, dstip ORDER BY n DESC

query_description: Distinct destination ports per source-destination IP pair
sql: SELECT srcip, dstip, COUNT(DISTINCT dstport) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcip, dstip ORDER BY n DESC

query_description: Distinct 5-tuple flows per source-destination IP pair
sql: SELECT srcip, dstip, COUNT(DISTINCT (srcip, dstip, srcport, dstport, proto)) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcip, dstip ORDER BY n DESC
SELECT srcip, dstip, srcport, dstport, proto, COUNT(*) AS pkts FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcip, dstip, srcport, dstport, proto ORDER BY pkts DESC
SELECT srcip, dstip, srcport, dstport, proto, SUM(pkt_len) AS bytes FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcip, dstip, srcport, dstport, proto ORDER BY bytes DESC
